task_completion.description: Verify the Blanket Order is created with the correct supplier, item, quantity, rate, and dates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Blanket Order screen showing Supplier 'Eagle Hardware', Item 'Base Plate', Quantity '500', Rate '42', From Date '2025-01-01', and To Date '2025-12-31'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Blanket Order is in a Submitted state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status badge indicating the Blanket Order is 'Submitted' or 'Open' (not 'Draft').

task_completion.description: Verify the first Purchase Order is created for 100 units and linked to the Blanket Order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Purchase Order screen showing Supplier 'Eagle Hardware', Item 'Base Plate', Quantity '100', Rate '42', and a visible reference to the Blanket Order in the item row details.

task_completion.description: Verify the first Purchase Order is in a Submitted state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status badge indicating the first Purchase Order is 'Submitted' or 'To Receive and Bill' (not 'Draft').

task_completion.description: Verify the second Purchase Order is created for 150 units and linked to the Blanket Order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a second Purchase Order screen showing Supplier 'Eagle Hardware', Item 'Base Plate', Quantity '150', Rate '42', and a visible reference to the Blanket Order in the item row details.

task_completion.description: Verify the second Purchase Order is in a Submitted state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status badge indicating the second Purchase Order is 'Submitted' or 'To Receive and Bill' (not 'Draft').

task_completion.description: Verify the Blanket Order reflects the total ordered quantity from both Purchase Orders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Blanket Order screen showing an 'Ordered Qty' of 250 (out of the 500 total) in the item table.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web-based ERP GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show navigation and data entry within the ERP web interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually saved and submitted the documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for visual cues of interaction such as clicking 'Save' and 'Submit' buttons, confirmation dialogs ('Yes' to submit), or success toast notifications.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: All data must be entered into the appropriate ERP form fields (Blanket Order and Purchase Order forms), not in a text editor, JSON file, or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Supplier: Eagle Hardware. Item: Base Plate. Blanket Order Quantity: 500. Blanket Order Rate: 42. First Purchase Order Quantity: 100. Second Purchase Order Quantity: 150. Total Ordered Quantity on Blanket Order: 250. The task requires creating 1 Blanket Order and 2 Purchase Orders, all linked and in Submitted state.
